yes

The name just kept getting taken on a lot of websites before I got there. I didnt like having the underscore#
its just hard to remember which sites I have underscore on and which I didnt LuL
ahh ok
its the soup
There is def a lot of hard content
but that is to be expected I guess lol
The quality and scale of all the content is pretty insane
I thought when I gave Kale my stage it would be one of the larger ones.... how little I knew...
There really wasnt much in terms of restrictions. He gave me a difficulty number but that might be because I was the last one asked so they had more of an idea of what they wanted for that slot.
I think other than that it just had to not be obscenely large lol

Syrenyx_live subscribed at Tier 1. They've subscribed for 63 months, currently on a 63 month streak! Creedle 2! Heard a lot abt this but not seen it played yet. Lots o' hard post-game content I've been told.
We were also told the bare minimum too. like, we had no idea about there being a stage per tileset, or who the other makers were ect
or how many there even were
Still rockin' that dank cat background image.
I know a little abt the game so no spoilies ig?
I'll keep shut abt what I know then.
I am nowhere near good enough to play this game rn. Hell, some of the later IWEIMM sections are still giving me some trouble.
lol
Syrenyx_live watched 3 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak! oo, free points.

ahh
Does this game not feature rebinding keys by default?
Q is my left key when playing on keyboard lol
@Syrenyx_live it should but people who use rebinds typically do it outside the game so they dont have to set them again for every game.
its just more convenient in the long run
fair enough

I wanna do a fangame, yea. I was thinking abt making a IWEIMM fangame, continuing the "I Want" -> "Burnmind" -> "IWEIMM" chain but I think I got a different idea that wants to escape my brain into the real world.
balloons will not haha, i can tell you that
@LemonLumen yup... relatable.
Burnmind is amazing
ik
its great
didnt record it either?
NOOOOO
Don't remember whether I played Freezemind
I played it a ton, found a lot of the skips and stuff for the speedrun
but yeah balloons is a much much older game, and tons of the gameplay isn't made by me either
Freezemind is insane. its harder and pretty long, well worth playing but takes more of a time investment
i think you'll still enjoy it a lot though
lmao
I might do Burnmind & Freezemind again as a chill game while I grind out the IWEIMM deathless clear. Usually do dual gaming, one focus heavy challenge & one casual completion.
i didnt even know about the entrance until pretty late, i was not involved in that at all
If you are into burnmind/freezemind I would definately recommend I Want as well.
lol
@LemonLumen I think I've seen it but not played it myself. I am aware of it though.
May also replay rand rand rand. That game is peak.
its kinda a precursor to burnmind and freezemind
@LemonLumen I am aware, yea.
but yeah i wouldnt submit anything i cut from balloons somewhere else lol, otherwise i wouldnt have cut it haha
IWEIMM then is the spinoff of that trilogy? Or is it more fanfic?
close
I can see the surreal vibe being similar as well as some of the gimmicks being more out there.
IWEIMM is just very authencially janes style and there is more coincidentally some alignments with burnmind rather than intentionally
escape into my mind very much feels like a single fully realized vision
Speaking of, I gotta report some more bugs in IWEIMM. Found another attack projectile that doesn't have a hitbox as well as some other jank.

I wanna Eat the Worm might be worth checking out since it is also made by Erik so it has some similarlities with burnmind and freezemind. also is a collab with other people (including myself) for fangame marathon.
